description: Turn Google Maps links into geo: links Usage 1. Go to Google Maps or a web browser and share a link with Geo Share. 2. Geo Share will turn the link into a geo: link and open it with one of your installed apps. You can also copy the geo: link into clipboard. How it works and anti-features Geo Share gets the geographical coordinates required to create a geo: link by parsing the Google Maps URL. But not all Google Maps URLs contain coordinates. When that's the case, Geo Share will ask you if it can connect to Google to read the coordinates from the HTTP headers or the HTML document of the Google Maps link. For more information, see the app's FAQ screen.
